overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a dark forest trail at night, rendered in a game engine. The camera moves steadily along a narrow dirt path past rock formations and dense trees, with visibility limited to a dim illuminated cone suggesting a flashlight or headlamp.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail with rock wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest trail between a large rock formation on the left and dense trees on the right

entered.detail: large rocky outcrop covered with moss and small vegetation flanking the left side of the trail
tall straight tree trunks disappearing into the darkness ahead
dense cluster of tree trunks lining the immediate right side of the path
narrow winding dirt path with scattered leaves and small stones
low green vegetation and ferns at the base of the trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest trail at night, with a large moss-covered rock formation immediately to the left. The camera moves forward along the narrow dirt path, flanked by dense trees and undergrowth on both sides. The scene is enveloped in darkness with only the path ahead dimly illuminated.

events.description: passing the large rock formation, entering deeper section of the forest corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding trail through the dense woodland, moving past cut logs on the left

entered.detail: stack of cut logs or thick branches beside the trail

segments.scene_description: Having passed the rock formation, the trail continues through a dense forest corridor. Cut logs appear on the left side of the path while the tree trunks recede slightly to the mid-distance on the right. The environment remains consistently dark and enclosed with thick vegetation.

events.description: night sky becomes visible through the tree canopy ahead, indicating approach to forest edge

agents.ego_description: walking toward the visible sky opening ahead, continuing along the trail as it curves slightly

entered.detail: patch of dark night sky visible through the gap in the tree canopy ahead

segments.scene_description: The forest begins to open up as the trail approaches a clearing, with a patch of night sky now visible through the trees ahead. The tree trunks on the left draw closer while those on the right recede into the distance. The path continues forward toward the illuminated gap in the canopy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a dark forest trail that gradually transitions from a claustrophobic wooded corridor into a small clearing. It begins beside a large moss-covered rock formation, moving steadily along a narrow dirt path flanked by dense undergrowth and towering trees. As the camera advances past the rock, the environment remains enclosed and dim, passing cut logs on the left while the surrounding vegetation maintains a tight, oppressive grip on the trail. The scene then begins to open up as the dense canopy thins, revealing a patch of night sky through the trees ahead. Finally, the path leads toward this illuminated gap in the forest, with the tree trunks shifting in perspective as the camera approaches the edge of the clearing.
